description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on push to main and release branches, excluding certain CI configuration files. Run a matrix job on ubuntu-latest for multiple Linux environments (Ubuntu 20.04 and Debian 11) with different architectures (armhf, arm64, ppc64el), checking out the code, installing qemu-user-static, pulling a Docker image, setting up environment variables, and running a series of scripts to install, build, and test a project using a Docker container.
